arts.ttl: Too many kind words, and not enough harsh ones, at Carlisle United
arts.sum: JON COLMAN: Too much this season has been praised without the evidence to back it up. The reflection on it all must be much more critical, in-house.

arts.ttl: AFC Wimbledon boss on what he expects against Carlisle United
arts.sum: AFC Wimbledon manager Johnnie Jackson says his side cannot “for one minute” expect an easy ride against rock-bottom Carlisle United.

arts.ttl: Former Carlisle United midfielder signs new Annan deal
arts.sum: Former Carlisle United midfielder Josh Dixon has signed a contract extension with Annan Athletic.

arts.ttl: Carlisle United to stage tribute to Poppy Atkinson
arts.sum: Carlisle United fans will pay tribute to ten-year-old Poppy Atkinson before their game against AFC Wimbledon.

Carlisle's 1-0 defeat to Harrogate last weekend made it just one win in their last nine games and time is running out for Mark Hughes to keep the Cumbrians in the Football League. Wimbledon's 2-1 def...
